steps: Chill Acetonitrile Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34998 to °C . I used the reagent and temperature components in this step.
Combine 1 µL Acetonitrile Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34998 and 1 µL Blood serum Contributed by users . I used the amount and reagent components in this step.

Centrifuge the Blood serum Contributed by users using the following parameters 27000 rcf, -20 °C, 2 minutes, 2 rounds . I used the reagent and centrifuge components in this step. I also use the centrifugation step icon.

Dry the Blood serum Contributed by users for 24:00:00 using Eppendorf Vacufuge Concentrator System (Eppendorf, 5301) I used the reagent, duration equipment components. I also used the overnight step icon.
This is an arbitrary sub-step that tells you to go to step #1 . I used the GoTo component in this sub-step.
This is my note. I used the note component and the critical step icon.
This is a step with special safety concerns. This is my safety warning. I used the safety warning component and the toxic step icon.
Use 50 % volume Blood serum Contributed by users in Acetonitrile Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #34998 to do something. I used the volume and reagent components in this step.
